name: MoneyGram
description_short: Harvey, LA MoneyGram at 1028 Manhattan Blvd: check-cashing and money transfer services.
description_long:
MoneyGram at 1028 Manhattan Blvd STE C in Harvey, LA operates as a standalone check-cashing store in a convenient Harvey location. The store is open Monday through Friday from 8 AM to 8 PM, Saturday from 9 AM to 5 PM, and closed on Sundays.

This Harvey MoneyGram location offers domestic and international money transfers, check cashing, bill payment, and prepaid card services. Call +1 504-368-9571 to confirm service availability or ask about transfer fees for your destination.

For Harvey residents and visitors, this MoneyGram provides a quick way to send money, cash checks, or pay bills without a bank account. Bring a government-issued ID and know your recipient's details if transferring funds. MoneyGram offers 24/7 online service at moneygram.com if you prefer remote transfers.
address: 1028 Manhattan Blvd STE C, Harvey, LA 70058

company_info.headquarters: 1028 Manhattan Blvd STE C, Harvey, LA 70058

pros: Extensive network of 6+ agent locations within Harvey area provides convenient neighborhood access
Multiple partner types (supermarkets, wireless stores, markets) allow customers to combine shopping with money transfers
Online and offline transfer options give flexibility in how customers manage transactions
Partner locations typically open early (7:00-8:00 AM) enabling morning transactions
Established global brand with long operational history and international transfer capabilities
Location finder tool with map interface simplifies finding nearest agent branch
Same-day transfer capability through multiple channels (online or in-person)
cons: No company-owned branches; relies entirely on third-party retailers, limiting direct customer support
Transfer fees not disclosed on this page; international rates and currency exchange margins not transparent
Service hours dependent on partner location hours; no guarantee of extended or weekend availability
Partner network turnover risk means advertised locations may close or discontinue MoneyGram services
Limited information on this location page regarding specific fees, transfer limits, or processing times
best_for: Customers sending money to family members domestically or internationally who need quick access
Unbanked or underbanked individuals lacking traditional bank accounts who need money transfer services
Users preferring in-person transactions at neighborhood retail locations over online-only services
People seeking convenient cash pickup options at multiple nearby locations
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for individuals who need quick, accessible money transfer services and prefer in-person transactions at neighborhood retail locations. The main caveat is that as an agent-based network, service quality and availability depend on partner retailers, and customers should verify specific fees, transfer limits, and hours at their chosen location before transacting.
services: Domestic money transfers (send and receive funds within the United States)
International money transfers to customers' home countries or family members abroad
Online money transfer management through website
In-person cash transfers at agent retail locations
Location search and agent finder service with map interface
Cash pickup services at partner retail locations
Money transfer tracking and management tools
Bill payment services (referenced in category description)
meta_description: Harvey, LA MoneyGram at 1028 Manhattan Blvd. Check cashing and wire transfers.
